title: Eymistaken's HUD
description: A highly customizable PvP HUD featuring a Drag & Drop Layout Designer, CPS, Keystrokes, Reach, Armor HUD and Combo display.
body:
# Eymistaken's HUD
**A Modular PvP Interface for Fabric 1.21.11**

> ### [VISIT THE OFFICIAL WEBSITE & USER GUIDE](https://eymistaken.github.io/Eymistaken-s-HUD-Website/)
> *For detailed module showcases, the Keystrokes Designer guide, and API documentation, please refer to our official website.*

Eymistaken's HUD provides a professional competitive experience designed directly for your mods folder. It offers a lightweight, fully customizable workspace for PvP enthusiasts who prefer a clean mod implementation over heavy external clients.

## Core Features
* In-Game Layout Designer
* Dynamic Armor HUD
* Combat Combo Tracker & Heatmap
* Decimal-Precise Reach Tracker
* Advanced CPS Monitor
* Real-Time FPS Display
* Network Ping Indicator

## Installation
1. Install Fabric Loader.
2. Download Eymistaken's HUD.
3. Install Fabric API and Cloth Config API.
4. Place the files into your `.minecraft/mods` folder.

---
> [WARNING]
> **IMPORTANT CONFIGURATION NOTE:**
> If you are updating from a version that older than _v1.0.8_, please delete your old config file (`simplecps.json`) to prevent layout issues and ensure full compatibility with the newest features.
